title: Billing cleanup + E2E smoke + ops runbook (Phase F+G)
realignNote: Scope reconciled to SPEC-193 reality (owner-approved 2026-06-09): F1+F2+G2 executed; G1 (10 manual smokes) superseded by SPEC-193 batched smoke; G3 (SPEC-122/109 closure ceremony) superseded — legacy parent.

tasks.title: Dead-code verification + removal
tasks.description: Deleted 3 confirmed-dead @deprecated re-export shims in apps/api/src/services (addon-status-transitions.ts, promo-code.crud.ts, promo-code.redemption.ts). The addon-status-transitions test was the sole coverage of those re-exports → migrated to packages/service-core/test/billing/addon-status-transitions.test.ts (canonical). Originally-listed candidates addon-downgrade-detection/addon.admin/reactivateFromTrial are NOT dead and were kept. qzpay vendor.types.ts is cross-repo (out of scope). Verified: api typecheck EXIT 0 after dist rebuild; promo-code (63) + addon (78) tests green. Commit 53c808431.

tasks.title: Documentation + CLAUDE.md updates (hospeda)
tasks.description: Refreshed billing architecture pointers: root CLAUDE.md (billing quick reference), apps/api/CLAUDE.md (routes/cron list), packages/db/CLAUDE.md (mp_subscription_id note), runbook backlinks in packages/billing + apps/api docs. qzpay READMEs out of scope (cross-repo). Files already accurate left untouched. Commit 41285d8bf.

tasks.title: 10 manual MP sandbox smokes
tasks.description: SUPERSEDED by SPEC-193 batched-smoke model. The billing smokes are accumulated in SPEC-193 pending-staging-smoke.md and owner-executed once before the staging->main promotion. Not executable as part of this code/docs spec (manual, real MP).

tasks.title: Ops runbook authoring
tasks.description: Authored docs/migration/mercadopago-sandbox-runbook.md (296 lines) as the operator entry point — MP dashboard config, sandbox test-user creation, webhook/preapproval inspection, rollback, pre-prod checklist pointer. Cross-references (does NOT duplicate) SPEC-143 staging/prod smoke checklists + mp-test-cards-reference and the SPEC-193 batched-smoke list. Commit c11ac7418.

tasks.title: SPEC-109 update + SPEC-122 closure
tasks.description: SUPERSEDED. SPEC-122 is the legacy parent; active master is SPEC-193. No SPEC-122 6-children closure ceremony performed. Production toggle / Coolify / homologation handoff remains owner-owned under SPEC-109/SPEC-193 promotion.
